documents.title: Project Overview
documents.content:
Project Overview

DevBoard is a thinking canvas for solo devs — a place to capture ideas, connect them, and ship faster.

Goalsdsfsdf

See [[Tech Stack]] for the full technology breakdown. The main design decisions are captured in canvas nodes on the Roadmap page.
The feature sticky @node:sticky-shipping covers our export and sharing strategy.

Status

MVP is in progress. Next milestone: launch on itch.io. Sprint details are in [[Sprint Notes]].
